LanguageData.XCOM_PlasmaLight.label: Light Plasma
LanguageData.XCOM_PlasmaLight.description: Highly-energized ionized gas capable of devastating burn effects.
LanguageData.XCOM_PlasmaDense.label: Dense Plasma
LanguageData.XCOM_PlasmaDense.description: Highly-energized ionized gas capable of devastating burn effects.
LanguageData.XCOM_PlasmaUnstable.label: Unstable Plasma
LanguageData.XCOM_PlasmaUnstable.description: Highly-energized ionized gas capable of devastating burn effects.
